extortion.description: Accuride, founded in 1986 and headquartered in Evansville, Indiana, manufactures and supplies vehicle components. Almost terabyte of files will be available for you. Of course there will be many interesting ones. For instance, engineering drawings and photo for TESLA, Mirelli and other sound names. Besides that many confidential documents, personal information of employees with private photo and docs, medical information etc. And finally there is muchinfo about clients and their orders and projects with detailed description (drawings, 3D models). Should I note tons of financialand accounting information? Wait for the release.
